title: Fee Refund.cdr
markdown:
## Fee Refund Applicaon Form

I have the honour to request you kindly to refund the sum of Rs……………………......... 
Paid by me to the Account Office, LLU, on account of Lahore Leads University.       The 
necessary parculars are given below:-

Signature of the applicant......

Name in block letters......

Full Address......

Phone No.....

## PARTICULARS

1. Name of Program.....2. Year and Session.....
3. Roll No.....4. Registered No. (If any).....
5. (a) Department from which appeared applied.....
(b) District or State from which appeared applied.....
6. Admission fee paid.....
7. Tuition fee paid.....
8. Library fee paid.....
9. Examination fee paid.....
10. Other fee paid.....
11. University Bank Challan No. and Date.....
Mention Bank Challan No. & date and attach Photo Copy otherwise application Will not be entertained.

12. Amount claimed as refund .....
13. Reasons for claiming refund: .....

---

## RULES

Refund of fee shall be allowed:
-

## Refund of fee shall be allowed: -

A student who fails to join the program to which s/he has been admied shall be given tuion fee refund
(of the paid amount), on wrien request from the student to the Registrar duly supported with the official 
fee  receipt  -as  per HEC’s  Naonal  Level Fee-Refund  policy  circulated  vide  their  leer no.
101/HEC/A&C/2012/94 dated September 11, 2012, in accordance with the schedule given below:.

Full (100%) Fee Refund
Half (50%) Fee Refund

Half (50%) Fee Refund

**Timeline from semester commencement** 
Up to 7th day of convene of classes

No (0%) Fee Refund

Up to 7th day of convene of classes 
From 8th - 15th day of convene of classes

From 16th day of convene of classes

Reason for refund of fee:

From 8th - 15th day of convene of classes

Head of Department

Registrar
